predictions.source_quote: 2021 global growth of 6.4% is expected (following a contraction of 3.4% in 2020)
According to Morgan Stanley Research, global GDP will return to its pre-COVID path (i.e., what it would have been absent the COVID-19 shock) by 4Q21.
inflation will pick up, predominately in the U.S., rising to 2% by the end of 2021 and 2.5% in 2022 vs 1.2% in 2020.
